title: Deployments
subtitle: Applications in the selected namespace
empty: No deployments found in this namespace
emptyAll: No deployments found in accessible namespaces

projectGroups.restartingBanner: Restarting {{count}} of {{total}} deployments in this group
projectGroups.settingsRebuildHint: Rebuilds compose, reapplies the manifest in Kubernetes, loads images into kind, and rolls out deployments in this group.
projectGroups.settingsNoCompose: No compose project with this name was found. Rebuild is only available for groups imported from Docker Compose.
projectGroups.deleteMessage: Delete all deployments, services, and secrets in group "{{name}}"?

statusModal.title: Deployment status

summary.starting: The deployment is starting. This is normal right after create.
summary.degraded: Some pods are not ready. Open details to see why.
summary.scaledToZero: Replica count is 0, no pods are running.
summary.disabled: Deployment is disabled. Pods are stopped until you enable it again.
summary.restarting: Rolling restart in progress: {{ready}}/{{desired}} ready, {{updated}}/{{desired}} updated.

reasons.starting: The deployment was just created or is updating.
reasons.scaledToZero: Scaled to zero, no pods are running.
reasons.disabled: Disabled via Deployard. Enable to restore {{replicas}} replica(s).
reasons.podsNotReady: {{ready}} of {{desired}} ready, not all pods passed readiness probes.
reasons.podsNotAvailable: {{available}} of {{desired}} available, pods are not ready yet.
reasons.rolloutStalled: Rolling update finished but pods are not becoming ready. See the table below.
reasons.restarting: Pods are being recreated: {{ready}}/{{desired}} ready, {{updated}}/{{desired}} updated.

statusModal.podsEmpty: No pods found for this deployment.
statusModal.podsHint: The image may be missing in the cluster. Build it locally and load into kind, or use a registry.

actions.label: Actions
actions.enableAfterError: Enable again. Errors were present when disabled

files.noPods: No pods available for this deployment

scale.label: Replicas
scale.hint: Change how many pod copies the deployment should keep running.

disable.disableHint: Stops all pods and saves the current replica count for quick restore.
disable.enableHint: Restores {{replicas}} replica(s) and starts pods again.
disable.enableErrorHint: Errors were present when this deployment was disabled. Fix the image or config, then enable again ({{replicas}} replicas).

console.empty: Connect to start an interactive shell in the selected pod.

detail.subtitle: Namespace: {{namespace}}
detail.logsEmpty: No pods available for log streaming

create.title: New deployment
create.imagePlaceholder: Pick from catalog or type your own
create.projectHint: Deployments with the same label are shown together in the list.

image.label: Container image
image.hint: Updates the deployment template and triggers a rolling rollout.
image.error: Failed to update the container image.

imagePicker.catalogHint: {{count}} images: Web server, Database, Runtime, and more
imagePicker.empty: No matches. Type a custom image above.

delete.title: Delete deployment
delete.message: Delete deployment {{name}}? All pods will be removed.

restart.hint: Rolling restart recreates all pods with the same image (like kubectl rollout restart).
restart.bannerHint: Pods are being recreated. Watch the Pods tab for live status.

config.title: Environment variables
config.createHint: Catalog images get dev defaults. Review before creating.

healthProbes.title: Health probes
healthProbes.empty: No probes configured for the primary container
